column3:
1. Execute authentication UTCIDs with the exact name/email and password combinations in this matrix.
2. For each login attempt, record whether authentication succeeds, then confirm whether a valid session/token is issued.
3. For invalid input, unknown account, malformed identity, or wrong password cases, capture the exact error feedback and confirm no authenticated session is created.

column2: Precondition
Name
1. Submit a non-existent name/email value and a correct-looking password; confirm the account lookup fails cleanly
2. Leave the name/email field empty while keeping the login request otherwise intact
3. Submit a valid existing active name/email value and use the expected correct password
4. Submit a malformed name/email containing invalid special-character format
Password
1. Leave the password field empty while the name/email field is populated
2. Submit a wrong password for an existing active account
3. Submit the correct password for the selected existing active account
Return
T
F
Exception
Log message
Unknown-user attempt returned the visible message "User does not exist" and no authenticated session was created
Empty-identity attempt returned the visible message "Name/Email is empty" and no authenticated session was created
Login succeeded and the system issued exactly one authenticated session/token
Malformed-identity attempt returned the visible message "Invalid name/email format" and no authenticated session was created
Blank-password attempt returned the visible message "Password is empty" and no authenticated session was created
Wrong-password attempt returned the visible message "Invalid password" and no authenticated session was created
Passed/Failed
